# backward

**Type Property**

Past data support. Use this option when it makes sense to provide past data for your complication.

## Declaration

```swift
static var backward: CLKComplicationTimeTravelDirections { get }
```

## Constants

- **forward**: Future data support. Use this option when it makes sense to provide future data for your complication.
